title: pleurostima caricina
side_effects: Pleurostima caricina can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and vomiting due to its high concentration of toxic compounds. In severe cases, ingestion of the plant can lead to respiratory failure and even death. Additionally, improper use of the plant may cause skin irritation, allergic reactions, and increased heart rate. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using any plant for medicinal purposes to avoid such adverse effects.
